name: CASTLE BIOSCIENCES INC
business: Castle Biosciences is a molecular diagnostics company offering innovative test solutions to aid clinicians in the diagnosis and treatment of dermatologic cancers, Barrett's esophagus (BE), atopic dermatitis (AD), uveal melanoma (UM).

exposures.sentence: Castle Biosciences is a molecular diagnostics company offering innovative test solutions to aid clinicians in the diagnosis and treatment of dermatologic cancers, Barrett's esophagus (BE), atopic dermatitis (AD), uveal melanoma (UM).

catalysts.event: Limited access launch of AdvanceAD-Tx test
catalysts.sentence: We commenced a limited access launch of the AdvanceAD-Tx test in November 2025 and plan phased expansion of availability throughout 2026.

catalysts.event: Plan to offer Esopredict test as supplemental option
catalysts.sentence: Beginning in the first quarter of 2026, we also plan to offer the Esopredict test as a supplemental option for cases in which TissueCypher does not produce an actionable result.

catalysts.event: FDA Breakthrough Device designation for DecisionDx-Melanoma
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, the FDA granted Breakthrough Device designation to our DecisionDx-Melanoma test.

catalysts.event: Submitted reconsideration requests for DecisionDx-SCC LCDs
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, we submitted reconsideration requests for both Novitas and MolDX LCDs.

catalysts.event: Extended interest-only period on term loan to December 1, 2026
catalysts.sentence: On August 26, 2025, we elected to extend the interest-only period to December 1, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. TAM for DecisionDx-Melanoma approximately $540 million
tamClaims.sentence: In a typical year, we estimate approximately 130,000 patients are diagnosed with invasive CM in the U.S., representing an estimated U.S. TAM of approximately $540 million.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. TAM for TissueCypher approximately $1 billion
tamClaims.sentence: There are approximately 4 million patients in the U.S. currently diagnosed with BE and approximately 415,000 patients annually undergo an endoscopic biopsy with a subsequent diagnosis of ND, IND or LGD BE, representing an estimated U.S. TAM of approximately $1 billion.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. TAM for AdvanceAD-Tx approximately $33 billion
tamClaims.sentence: Using multiple data sources focused on one-year prevalence, we estimate there are approximately 10 million individuals ages 12 and older in the U.S. with moderate-to-severe AD, representing an estimated U.S. TAM of approximately $33 billion.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. TAM for DecisionDx-SCC approximately $820 million
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate 20% of SCC patients, or approximately 200,000 annually in the U.S., are classified as high risk, representing an estimated U.S. TAM of approximately $820 million.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. TAM for MyPath Melanoma approximately $600 million
tamClaims.sentence: Of the two million suspicious pigmented lesions biopsied annually in the U.S., we estimate approximately 300,000 of those present a difficult-to-diagnose melanocytic lesion, representing an estimated U.S. TAM of approximately $600 million.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. TAM for DecisionDx-UM approximately $10 million
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate approximately 2,000 patients in the U.S. are diagnosed annually with UM, representing an estimated U.S. TAM of approximately $10 million.
